site.title: Paulo Tuya | Delivery, Partnerships & Operations
site.description: Portfolio of Paulo Tuya, a delivery and partnerships operator across gaming, esports, and remote programs.

hero.name: I turn partner and project goals into clear execution.
hero.pitch: I work across gaming, esports, and remote programs, connecting partner needs, scope, owners, timelines, and execution without losing operational control.
hero.role: Delivery, partnerships, and operations across gaming, esports, and remote programs.

values.title: How I Work
values.subtitle: I build delivery around clarity, stakeholder alignment, and calm operational control.
values.card1Text: I turn loose goals into scopes, owners, timelines, and operating artifacts that make execution easier to trust.
values.card2Text: I keep partners, teams, vendors, and internal stakeholders aligned without letting handoffs or approvals derail delivery.
values.card3Text: I care about readiness, issue handling, and closeout quality as much as kickoff energy, because delivery is judged at the finish line.

skills.title: Capability Clusters
skills.subtitle: The skills section supports the portfolio by showing how I operate, not by listing every tool I have touched.

projects.pageDescription: Selected work across activations, partnerships, and delivery-heavy programs.

projects.heroSubtitle: These case summaries show how I move between partner-facing scope, operational planning, and execution on the ground.
projects.title: Selected Work
projects.subtitle: A few programs that show how I bridge partner needs, live execution, and delivery control.

timeline.title: Experience
timeline.subtitle: A curated path from production and league operations into partnerships, account-facing delivery, and founder-led execution.

workPage.description: The page stays intentionally curated. It highlights the programs that best connect partnerships, delivery systems, and accountable execution without turning the portfolio into a project archive.

experiencePage.title: A delivery path shaped by operations, partner-facing work, and execution ownership.
experiencePage.subtitle: Based in Lima, Peru. Native Spanish, professional English, and working Portuguese.
experiencePage.description: The page focuses on the roles that best explain how I moved from tournament and production operations into partnerships fulfillment, account-facing delivery, and founder-led execution.
experiencePage.locationAndLanguages: Based in Lima, Peru. Native Spanish, professional English, and working Portuguese.

footerCTA.title: Start a conversation
footerCTA.subtitle: If you are hiring for delivery, operations, or partner-facing execution, I am open to remote opportunities and thoughtful conversations.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Email is the fastest way to reach me. LinkedIn and Instagram stay public for follow-up and professional context.
